# SimpleMemo (Capito式シンプルメモ)

> A fast iOS memo-to-email app that launches in 0.3 seconds and sends notes to your inbox with one tap — built as a modern replacement for Captio after it was removed from the App Store in 2025.

## Key Facts
- Developer: Hajime Ataka
- Website: https://simplememofast.com
- Type: iOS memo-to-email app (Captio alternative)
- Launch speed: 0.3 seconds
- Core feature: One-tap send memo to your own email
- Security: AES-GCM encryption, no server storage of memo text
- Architecture: Outbox pattern with offline auto-resend
- Tech stack: UIKit, Cloudflare Workers, Resend API
- Pricing: Free trial (7 days), Premium subscription
- Languages: Japanese, English
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/jp/app/%E8%BB%BD%E5%BF%AB%E3%82%B7%E3%83%B3%E3%83%97%E3%83%AB%E3%83%A1%E3%83%A2/id6758438948
- Origin: Built after Captio was removed from the App Store in 2025

## Pages
- [Homepage (Japanese)](https://simplememofast.com/): Main landing page describing the app's features, speed, and security
- [Homepage (English)](https://simplememofast.com/en/): English version of the landing page
- [About](https://simplememofast.com/about.html): Background story and developer information
- [Comparisons Hub](https://simplememofast.com/comparisons/): Side-by-side comparisons with other memo and note-taking apps
- [Blog](https://simplememofast.com/blog/): Articles on productivity, memo techniques, and app updates
- [Guides](https://simplememofast.com/guides/): How-to guides for using SimpleMemo effectively
- [Glossary](https://simplememofast.com/glossary/): Terminology and concepts related to memo apps and productivity
- [FAQ](https://simplememofast.com/faq.html): Frequently asked questions about the app
- [Privacy Policy](https://simplememofast.com/privacy.html): Privacy policy detailing data handling and encryption
- [Contact](https://simplememofast.com/contact.html): Contact information and support
